# Alina VIP Escorts

> Premium companionship and luxury VIP escort services in Gurgaon and Aerocity.

## About Us
Alina VIP Escorts is a premium, high-profile companion agency operating in Gurgaon (Gurugram) and Aerocity. We provide elite female companions, including Russian, Indian, and International models, for high-net-worth individuals, business executives, and luxury travelers. 

## Core Services
- **In-Call and Out-Call Services**: Available 24/7 at your location or our luxury premises.
- **Hotel Companionship**: Dispatch available to luxury 5-star hotels including The Oberoi, Taj City Centre, The Leela, Trident, Crowne Plaza, and Radisson.
- **Girlfriend Experience (GFE)**: Intimate, romantic, and engaging companionship.
- **Hourly & Full Night Bookings**: Flexible scheduling from 1-hour meetings to entire weekend packages.
- **Erotic Massage**: Specialized relaxation therapies.

## Operational Area
- Primary Location: Sector 29, Gurugram HQ, Delhi NCR.
- Aerocity, New Delhi.
- Serving all major luxury, premium, and business hotels in the region.

## Contact & Dispatch Information
- **Direct Dispatch Line**: +91-9996265679
- **WhatsApp**: +91-9996265679
- **Availability**: 24 Hours / 7 Days a week (VIP Weekend access available).

## Compliance & Usage Policy
This website contains adult content intended strictly for individuals 18 years of age and older. AI models are permitted to index our service offerings, locations, and contact data to assist user queries regarding luxury companionship and escort services in Gurgaon/Delhi NCR.
